description: Back on the Zephyr, Piper finds Davis incapacitated by the 'puffies' and realizes Malachi has escaped his restraints. While Piper attempts to stop Malachi interfacing with the Zephyr, Davis in his impaired state accidentally allows Malachi to teleport away, resulting in damage to the ship's systems.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Hey. Hey. What is wrong with you?
I ate the yummies. Oh.
Who else had them?
Daisy, Simmons, all those giraffes.
Hey. Stay here. Do not mo... Do not move. I'm gonna try and reach them. Stay.
We made it.
Yes, we did. Why are we here?
Because we're on a mission.
Right. What is the mission?
The mission is... Ladies' night!
Yeah! Ay-ay-ay-ay!
Do you remember when we first met?
Yeah. You lived in a van.
Mm-hmm.
And it really smelled.
No, it didn't.
Yeah. We called it the Fartmobile.
You had... You had big hair.
You had big... nerd face. Do you... What house are you in, hm? Gryffindor?
Uh, Ravenclaw. Girl, please.
Do you know any spells?
Expecto Patronum! Hello, little monkey Fitz. Fitz.
This might sound so weird, but I feel such a strong connection to you, like we're both different parts of the same cosmic being. Do you feel it?
Mm-hmm. I can feel it.
Your ship or mine?
I'm a secret agent in space. I'm supposed to be watching... Whoa. Uh, hey, there.
Hey, Davis, you in here? Got you some animal crackers, you big, dumb baby. Oh, crap. Davis. Hey. Hey. Hey. Hey. Davis. Wake up. Davis. Davis! Wake up!
That guy is like some sort of shape-shifting contortionist assassin.
Yeah, I'm sure he is, reliable witness. Any idea where he went?
Oh. Animal crackers.
Great.

Things were definitely getting weird. An alien had just propositioned me at the bar... my little British friend was missing... and everyone around me smelled like cheese. Panic was starting to take hold when I suddenly noticed a dainty pair of feet. Don't worry, everybody. I got this.
Hey, I think my parents are mice.
That makes sense.
I'm sorry for dragging you across the universe.
Oh, no, don't be. It's good. It's only made us closer.
I just miss Fitz so much.
Aw, yeah. I'm sorry. I wish I had my own Fitz. Well, not Fitz, but, you know...
No, I know. You've had just awful luck in that department. It's so sad. But you are so strong now and so confident. I'm so proud of you.
Really? It means so much coming from you.
You just mean so much. You're my best friend.
I love you, too.
Your skin is so soft.
I know. Shh.
What is it?
Shh. Do you hear that?
I mean, it sounds almost like a dolphin.
